summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KYC document placeholder fix. The backend now returns a helpful SVG placeholder when document files are missing instead of a broken image error. All admin features including KYC Queue, document viewer, navigation tabs, user filters, and password visibility toggle are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: KYC document endpoint returns SVG placeholder for missing files (200 status)
Backend: Placeholder SVG contains 'Document Unavailable' text
Backend: Placeholder SVG contains explanation about file not on server
Backend: All other backend APIs working (17/17 tests passed)
Frontend: Admin login successful with admin@ecommbx.io
Frontend: KYC Queue page loads correctly
Frontend: 2 pending KYC applications displayed
Frontend: KYC application details page loads
Frontend: Personal Information section visible
Frontend: Uploaded Documents section visible with 3 documents
Frontend: View button opens document viewer modal
Frontend: Document placeholder SVG displays correctly (not broken)
Frontend: Placeholder shows 'Document Unavailable' message
Frontend: Placeholder explains file is no longer on server
Frontend: Download button present in modal
Frontend: Close button works and closes modal
Frontend: Users tab accessible
Frontend: Accounts tab accessible
Frontend: Card Requests tab accessible
Frontend: Transfers Queue tab accessible
Frontend: Support Tickets tab accessible
Frontend: Tax Hold filter dropdown present with 3 options
Frontend: Notes filter dropdown present with 3 options
Frontend: User details page loads
Frontend: Password field visible with toggle button
Frontend: Password visibility toggle shows password (TestPass123!)
Frontend: Password visibility toggle hides password (dots)
Frontend: Admin Notes section present with Edit button
Frontend: Tax Hold Management section present
